title: Pip-Boy Mk IV
description: Adds the Pip-Boy Mk IV from fallout 4 into minecraft
body:
# **Info**
Hey guys, this datapack features the Pip-Boy Mk IV from fallout 4. I decided to make this because fallout was seemingly quite popular again, and because my brother is a big fan! Anyways, this pack adds a plethora of uses for the Pip-Boy. Some of it's features include a flashlight, a renewable source of shulker boxes, and a working radio! It can be crafted using 4 iron ingots, 2 leather, a glass pane, redstone dust, and a netherstar. That may seem expensive, but that's because this is such a useful tool! I hope you guys enjoy my newest datapack!
